response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy. His recent work at re:cinq on AI-agent infrastructure and full-stack development is highly relevant, and his background in high-throughput systems (e.g., Sociomantic) and operational ownership (e.g., on-call at Altom) further strengthens his candidacy. While his experience in AI-native environments is still emerging, his adaptability and hands-on contributions to developer tooling and agentic workflows make him a compelling fit.
strengths: Proven expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., Sociomantic, Dunnhumby).
Direct experience with AI-driven development and agentic systems (e.g., re:cinq's MCP code generators).
Strong operational ownership mindset, including CI/CD, monitoring, and on-call responsibilities (e.g., Altom Consulting).
concerns: Limited explicit mention of stakeholder management or cross-functional coordination at scale.
No clear evidence of prior staff-level technical strategy leadership (e.g., domain-wide decisions).
AI-native engineering experience is recent; depth in LLM/ML products is unproven.
